strengths: 6+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest/Jest ecosystem, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work dates back to 2014-2018
Cloud platform experience narrow (AWS CDK at Optilyz); no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer with well over the required 6 years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node/React track record, and directly relevant AI agent tooling work at re:cinq. Testing discipline and architecture exposure align well with the role. Gaps exist around Nest.js specifically and recent Kotlin/Java work, but the overall profile maps closely to the stack and responsibilities described.
